2362860.name: Adventures of Helio Demo
2362860.description: Adventures of Helio is an upcoming old school-style 2D platformer that will test your skills in the genre! In this Latin American-inspired game, you play as the young dragon, Helio, as he must battle and trek his way home before the sinister thief, El Ladron, does and steal his treasure! Play through 60 levels, in six worlds, and overcome various challenges and foes, including many insane bosses and creatures, in order to reach Helio's home and protect his treasure!
2362860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
